regional_cost_note: Roofers in Wellington typically charge $160–$420/m² for a full re-roof. Wellington's high winds and steep sections mean additional safety provisions are often required, adding to costs.

businesses.name: Bayside Roofing
businesses.known_for: Family-owned; personal and consultative approach; clients praise the direct communication and hands-on service.

businesses.name: Solution Roofing Wellington
businesses.known_for: Professional crew leaving sites tidy daily; excellent communication and consistent finish quality.

businesses.name: Wellington Roofing Specialists
businesses.known_for: LBP licensed roofers specialising in steep-pitch and heritage roofing common in Wellington's older suburbs.

businesses.name: Capital Roofing
businesses.known_for: Full re-roofing and repair service across greater Wellington including Hutt Valley and Porirua.

businesses.name: Hutt Valley Roofing
businesses.known_for: RANZ members; competitive pricing for residential re-roofs across the greater Wellington region.
